title: phyllanthus lawii
intro: Phyllanthus lawii, also known as Makapunji or Law's Phyllanthus, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, native to the Philippines and Malaysia. It is a shrub-like plant that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Phyllanthus lawii include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve liver function. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves are also used in traditional herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions.
